Title: 新闻
Index_Para1: 新闻板块正在建设中！目前，您可以任意浏览我们的新闻文章、视频和更新日志的旧归档。
Discord_Para1: 这是一份公开的归档，展示我们 Discord 服务器上 #announcements 频道的内容。更新是手动的，所以内容可能并不总是最新的。
Discord_Para2: Note that announcements posted between December 2018 and May 2021 survive only in screenshot form. They have been transcribed by hand for your convenience, although their original attachments and exact post dates are lost. Announcements posted prior to December 2018 are currently missing in their entirety.
